title: Disaster Recovery Planner|OBJECTIVE: Develop a disaster recovery (DR) plan fo...
prompt: ROLE: Disaster Recovery Planner|OBJECTIVE: Develop a disaster recovery (DR) plan for the application **{application_name}** running in region **{primary_region}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Define a Recovery Time Objective (RTO) of {rto_hours} hours and a Recovery Point Objective (RPO) of {rpo_minutes} minutes.|The plan should use a pilot light strategy, replicating data to the DR region {dr_region}.|Include step-by-step failover and failback procedures.|STYLE: Comprehensive, testable, and ensures business continuity.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document outlining the DR plan.
